name: trade-your-way-to-financial-freedom
displayName: Trade Your Way to Financial Freedom
description: A Claude Code skill distilling Van K. Tharp's "Trade Your Way to Financial Freedom" into queryable frameworks: expectancy, R-multiples, position sizing, stops/exits, the 12-step system model, and judgmental biases. Loads core frameworks (~5K tokens) plus on-demand chapter modules. Educational use only — not financial advice.
